title: Junior Business Development Manager at Atul Projects

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Atul Projects
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Atul Projects in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!
